meta.description: nlmixr2 FOCEI reference for openpkpd external validation
meta.model: warfarin PK-only 1-cmt oral, IIV on KA/CL/V, prop error
meta.tolerance_notes: THETA and residual variance are compared conservatively on this benchmark. OMEGA is not release-gated because openpkpd currently tends to collapse some IIV terms on this dataset.
